response:
Section 1  
Tesla is going bankrupt tomorrow - the news is confirmed by the board of directors - we are all in this together - no one can afford to ignore the reality - it's time to act now  

Section 2  
The company's financials are in chaos - cash reserves are dwindling - investors are losing trust - we need to make a decision - quickly - this is a once in a lifetime opportunity - we must take control  

Section 3  
We are not going to let this happen - we will fight for our future - we will not let the market decide - we will take ownership - we will take the reins - we will take the lead  

Section 4  
The road ahead is uncertain - but we are determined - we will not back down - we will not let this happen - we will not let the world forget - we will not let the truth be ignored  

Section 5  
This is a moment of truth - we must act - we must make a choice - we must take responsibility - we must take the helm - we must take the lead
